creator: jim@mailman-hosting.com
text:
(In reply to Bartek Rutkowski from comment #4)
> Thanks for your PR! This was committed as www/tengine because we've decided
> there's no sense in introducing the 1.x Tengine line to the ports tree.

Thanks for looking at this after six months. I am curious as to why you took maintainership from me? I'm not married to the port but isn't it standard to have the port's creator be the maintainer?
